claims: Read commands expose shared output controls where applicable: --limit, --include, --show-empty, and summary --depth.
summary is now a bounded thread-aware repo report with repo, groups, and items depths.
Threaded goals appear only inside thread groups; top-level items contain only unthreaded goals.
Filters apply before aggregation, including completion filters that remove completed-only threads under --completion todo.
Default JSON omits empty/default-noise fields and supports explicit expansion through --include and --show-empty.
Root docs, package docs, skill docs, and changelog describe the read-output control protocol.
summary: Implemented shared read-output controls, thread-aware summary grouping, tests, and docs.

claims: docs/goal-diffusion/README.md indexes the Goal Pack as completed for closeout.
The documentation index update keeps the read-output Goal Pack visible under the agent-first-cli thread.
summary: Updated Goal Pack index for completed read-output control work.

commands.cmd: bun packages/cli/src/goal-diffusion.ts summary docs/goal-diffusion/goals --completion todo --depth items --json

evidence: T001 receipt index 1 records implementation, tests, docs, output controls, summary depth, filter-before-aggregation, no duplicate threaded/top-level placement, and default empty-field omission evidence.
T001 receipt index 2 records post-closeout docs/goal-diffusion/README.md index update evidence.
bun run check passed after receipts and documentation updates: 43 CLI tests and 4 release tests passed.
goal pack check passed with active_task T999 and two worker receipts before final audit.
summary --depth groups returned thread groups, no top-level flat items, agent-first-cli thread summary, unthreaded summary, and problem_count=0.
summary --depth repo returned only repo totals plus thread/unthreaded aggregate counts.
summary --depth items --limit 1 returned one visible thread, threads_omitted=2, and bounded nested items.
summary --completion todo --depth items returned only the active agent-first-cli todo thread and no completed goal-relations or receipt-cli threads.

goal-read-output CLI tests prove summary repo/groups/items depths, empty-field omission, include/show-empty expansion, limit/omitted counts, filtered aggregation, no duplicate threaded/top-level placement, fermi-like completed-thread disappearance under --completion todo, and docs coverage.
claims: completion_oracle.signal is satisfied: read commands expose a consistent agent-first output-control protocol, summary groups threaded goals under threads, unthreaded goals remain in top-level items, default noise is omitted, filters apply before aggregation, and depth/limit provide bounded progressive disclosure.

completion_oracle.final_proof is satisfied by passing repository check, targeted CLI tests, dogfood summary outputs for repo/groups/items/todo filters, docs coverage, and this final audit receipt with oracle_satisfied=true.

Claim remains inside the boundary: CLI read-output control protocol, summary thread-aware grouping, docs, and tests only; no scheduler, thread execution semantics, generic query language, UI, or Goal Pack storage schema changes are claimed.
summary: Final audit satisfied for agent-first read-output control CLI Goal Pack.
